title: Polished PipeShare workspace settings panel
description:
The client portal workspace settings (layout) panel has been redesigned for clearer structure and easier use. Layout editing is extracted into a dedicated module with dedicated styling, wired through the portal workspace layout service and file host shell.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Redesigned workspace settings panel layout and styling (dbg126).
Extract workspace layout modal into pipeshare/modules/workspace-settings.
Portal cache bust dbg126 on index.html; shared CSS on index, mobile, and guest shells.
